phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Museum of Jewish History is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está el Museo de Historia Judía?
phrases.pronunciation: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs DÓN-deh EHSTÁ EHL moo-SEH-oh DEH ee-stoh-REE-ah hoo-DÍ-ah

likely_response.local: En calle Sant Llorenç, junto a la sinagoga.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN KAHL-leh SAHNT YOH-rehn HOON-toh AH LAH see-nah-GOH-gah
likely_response.translation_en: On Sant Llorenç street, next to the synagogue.

responses.english: On Sant Llorenç street, next to the synagogue.
responses.phonetic: EHN KAHL-leh SAHNT YOH-rehn HOON-toh AH LAH see-nah-GOH-gah
responses.french: En calle Sant Llorenç, junto a la sinagoga.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Bonastruc ça Porta center is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde queda el centro Bonastruc ça Porta?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh KEH-dah el SEN-troh boh-nahs-TROOK sah POHR-tah?

likely_response.local: Siga recto hasta la Plaza Sant Pere, allí
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-gah REHTH-toh AH-stah LAH PLAH-thah SAHNT PEH-reh ahl-LÍ
likely_response.translation_en: In the square of the same name, next door.

responses.english: In the square of the same name, next door.
responses.phonetic: SEE-gah REHTH-toh AH-stah LAH PLAH-thah SAHNT PEH-reh ahl-LÍ
responses.french: Siga recto hasta la Plaza Sant Pere, allí

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main entrance to the quarter is
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde está la entrada principal al barrio judío?
phrases.pronunciation: DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah ehn-TRAH-dah prin-see-PAHL ahl bahr-REE-oh hoo-DEE-oh?

likely_response.local: Por la escalera de la plaza del Vino.
likely_response.pronunciation: POHR LAH eh-skah-LEH-rah DEH LAH PLAH-thah DEHL BEE-noh
likely_response.translation_en: Via the staircase at Plaza del Vino.

responses.english: Via the staircase at Plaza del Vino.
responses.phonetic: POHR LAH eh-skah-LEH-rah DEH LAH PLAH-thah DEHL BEE-noh
responses.french: Por la escalera de la plaza del Vino.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to get a map of the Call
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo recoger un mapa del Call?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh PWEH-doh reh-koh-HEHR oon MAH-pah del KAH-y?

likely_response.local: En la taquilla de entrada, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah DEH ehnt-RAH-dah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the entrance ticket office, on the right.

responses.english: At the entrance ticket office, on the right.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah DEH ehnt-RAH-dah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: En la taquilla de entrada, a la derecha.
